acceptanceCriteria: At least one named downstream consumer or external steward has formally committed to adopt and sustain the feed; the commitment is documented.
At least one downstream Elyos project has actually shipped artifacts derived from cleared items to beneficiaries; the delivery is documented.
The LoC Labs engagement outcome is recorded honestly (committed, in-conversation, or no-response, whichever is true).
The By the People engagement outcome is documented honestly.
The partner commitment document is committed as a permanent record.
context: Per Elyos delivered means not merged: the project is not shipped until a committed downstream consumer/steward is secured and at least 1 downstream project actually ships artifacts to beneficiaries. This task finalizes partner engagement, secures a commitment, and documents the LoC Labs outcome honestly including no response if that is the case. Depends on partner-002. See PLAN.md (M3 exit criterion d).
objective: Secure a formal commitment from at least 1 downstream consumer or external steward, document at least 1 downstream project shipping artifacts to beneficiaries, and record the LoC Labs engagement outcome honestly.
output: A committed partner-commitment document recording the secured steward, downstream delivery evidence, and LoC Labs outcome.
title: Secure committed consumer/steward + document LoC Labs outcome
